provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Domestic Violence Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: any person who alleges to have been subjected to an act of domestic violence
biological, adopted, step or any child in the care or custody of the applicant or respondent
a magistrates court of any rank, and includes a customary court which has been authorised, by statutory instrument, to hear a matter under this Act

a relationship between an applicant and the respondent in any of the following ways—
( a ) they are or were married to each other

any controlling or abusive behavior that harms the health or safety of the applicant and includes—
( a ) physical abuse or threat thereof
